description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular electronic device with a rugged, weathered exterior, primarily finished in a rusty orange and metallic gray. The front features a large, circular, segmented dish or sensor, partially enclosed by two metallic prongs, suggesting it may be used for detection or measurement. The top panel is equipped with a digital display, several physical buttons, a rotary dial, and indicator lights, all set into a metallic control surface. The sides of the device show vent-like grilles and additional paneling, reinforcing its utilitarian, industrial design. The overall construction appears robust, with visible wear and scratches indicating frequent use in outdoor or urban environments. This device could plausibly serve as a specialized meter, scanner, or detector for field technicians or urban workers.
description: A rugged, rectangular electronic device with a circular sensor dish, digital display, buttons, and a rotary dial, finished in weathered orange and metallic gray.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular sensor dish with two metallic prongs and the edge of the control panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the sensor dish and the vent-like grille on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full control panel with digital display, buttons, rotary dial, and indicator lights.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side profile of the sensor dish and another vent-like grille.
